choices.text: Guaranteed Maximum Price: cost-plus until ceiling reached; contractor absorbs overruns beyond cap; underruns may be shared. Common in CMAR delivery. Balances cost-plus flexibility with owner exposure cap.

Liquidated damages (pre-agreed daily penalty, $1k-100k+/day depending on project) + retention (5-10% of each payment withheld, released at substantial completion). Both make late delivery + walking away expensive.
